name: askqa
description: Automated website testing and monitoring via MCP
long_description:
Create and manage automated tests for your websites using natural language. Monitor critical flows like checkout, login, and add-to-cart. Get notified when tests fail.

Security: This extension only makes HTTPS requests to api.askqa.ai. It does not read or write files on your computer.

Privacy Policy: https://askqa.ai/privacy

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your AskQA API key from https://askqa.ai/account

api_url.title: API URL
api_url.description: AskQA API endpoint (leave default for production)

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List available test templates with IDs, names, descriptions, and steps

tools.name: create_test
tools.description: Create a saved test using template or custom Playwright code

tools.name: screenshot_url
tools.description: Take screenshot of URL and extract page structure (links, buttons, inputs)

tools.name: validate_test
tools.description: Dry-run custom Playwright test code to debug before creating test

tools.name: list_tests
tools.description: List all saved tests with status and last run summary

tools.name: get_test
tools.description: Get full details of a test by ID, including code

tools.name: update_test
tools.description: Update existing test's name, URL, code, or other properties

tools.name: delete_test
tools.description: Permanently delete a test and its schedules

tools.name: run_test
tools.description: Run a saved test and wait for results with step details

tools.name: get_test_screenshots
tools.description: Get screenshots from a test run (images only)

tools.name: schedule_test
tools.description: Create recurring schedule for automated test runs

tools.name: list_schedules
tools.description: List all test schedules with last run and next run time

tools.name: update_schedule
tools.description: Pause or resume a test schedule

tools.name: get_test_results
tools.description: Get recent test run results with step-by-step details

tools.name: add_notification_channel
tools.description: Add notification channel for test failure alerts (email, Telegram, Slack)

tools.name: remove_notification_channel
tools.description: Remove a notification channel by ID

tools.name: test_notification_channel
tools.description: Send test notification to verify channel is working
